1: Many are are they that rise up against me.
2: There is There is no help for him in God. Selah. Selah.
3: My glory, and the lifter up of mine head.
4: And he heard me out of his holy hill. Selah. Selah.
5: I awaked; for the LORD LORD sustained me.
6: That have set themselves themselves against me round about.
7: Thou hast broken the teeth of the ungodly.
8: Thy blessing is is upon thy people. Selah. Selah.
